task_completion.description: Open the FZK-Haus 3D model in the BIM software (BlenderBIM/Bonsai).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender interface is open and the 3D viewport displays the FZK-Haus architectural model.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the 'Erdgeschoss' (Ground Floor) storey in the spatial hierarchy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Outliner or Spatial Manager panel shows the 'Erdgeschoss' storey expanded or highlighted/selected.

task_completion.description: Set up a 2D floor plan drawing view for the 'Erdgeschoss' storey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Drawings & Documents panel (or equivalent in BlenderBIM) shows a new drawing/plan view created specifically for the 'Erdgeschoss' storey, or a drawing camera/boundary is visible in the 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Generate the 2D SVG floor plan drawing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Create Drawing' / 'Update Drawing' button, activates the drawing view, or a generated 2D SVG floor plan (showing walls, doors, windows) is visible in the viewport or an image viewer.

task_completion.description: Save the updated IFC project containing the drawing definition to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file browser, or export panel shows the file being saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_with_drawings.ifc'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender/Bonsai graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's menus, outliner, and BIM toolbars rather than executing a pre-written Python script in the terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine FZK-Haus model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays a complex architectural house model with walls, doors, and windows, not an empty scene or a basic cube.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually inject drawing definitions into the IFC file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, or VS Code) manually editing the raw .ifc file text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target storey is explicitly named 'Erdgeschoss' and must be selected in the spatial hierarchy. The model is the FZK-Haus architectural model containing walls, doors, and windows. The final IFC file must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_with_drawings.ifc'. The drawing generation should use BlenderBIM/Bonsai tools to create an SVG floor plan.
